problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Combining Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
